sections.title: 🌅 Good Morning!
sections.content: Start your day with focus and intention.

sections.title: 🌡 Weather Check
sections.content: Check the weather in 上海 before heading out. Plan your day accordingly.

sections.title: ✅ Daily Habits
sections.content:
Today's habits:
□ Morning routine (exercise, meditation, journal)
□ Hydration goals (8 glasses)
□ Learning time (30 min reading/course)
□ Evening review (what went well?)

sections.title: 💚 Self-Care
sections.content:
Remember:
• Take breaks and rest your eyes
• Step away from screens for 5 min/hour
• Stay hydrated
• End work at a reasonable time

sections.title: 🌙 Evening Review
sections.content:
Before bed:
1. What did I accomplish today?
2. What am I grateful for?
3. What could I have done better?
4. Tomorrow's top priority?
